description: Request body to submit a natural-language development goal for autonomous execution (POST /v1/development/goals, development_routes.py). Crosses the API boundary; constitutionally required to carry a governing schema (ADR-056 D7). 'goal' and 'workflow_type' are required.

goal.description: Natural-language description of the development intent to be executed autonomously.

workflow_type.description: Workflow variant to use for execution (e.g. 'code_generation', 'code_modification').

write.description: When false (default), produce dry-run output only. When true, apply changes.
